text: Trump: I ended 8 wars, and if we add Iran and Lebanon, that will be 10 wars ended.
text_zh: 特朗普：我结束了8场战争，如果我们加上伊朗和黎巴嫩，那就是结束了10场战争。

text: Faytuks News So nothing has changed today IRGC still controls the Strait and is limiting traffic. All who pass must pay a toll. Not much is changed except what’s in the President’s imagination. https://www.wsj.com/livecoverage/iran-war-us-talks-2026/card/iran-tells-mediators-re-opening-of-hormuz-is-still-limited-0LlvoCJ6vt6PMRuYrJfa https://twitter.com/michaeldweiss/status/2045252256295948360/photo/1 - Michael Weiss tweet
text_zh: Faytuks News 所以今天什么都没有改变，伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）仍然控制着海峡并限制通行。所有通过的人都必须支付通行费。除了总统想象中的内容外，没有太大变化。https://www.wsj.com/livecoverage/iran-war-us-talks-2026/card/iran-tells-mediators-re-opening-of-hormuz-is-still-limited-0LlvoCJ6vt6PMRuYrJfa https://twitter.com/michaeldweiss/status/2045252256295948360/photo/1 - Michael Weiss 推文

text: Trump: I want to thank the country of Pakistan and its great prime minister and its great, great field marshal; he is a great field marshal.
text_zh: 特朗普：我要感谢巴基斯坦这个国家，感谢它伟大的总理和伟大的陆军元帅；他是一位伟大的陆军元帅。

text: The Spectator Index Trump says that Iran's uranium will be brought to the United States of America tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 特朗普称伊朗的铀将被运往美利坚合众国 推文

text: Visioner ‼️ 🇨🇳 🇯🇵 BREAKING | China’s Ministry of Defense has openly warned Japan and called on it to immediately halt its steps toward militarization, stating that otherwise tensions in the region will escalate. “We urge the Japanese side to stop its retrogressive moves and make a clean break with militarism. Otherwise, it will lose the trust of its Asian neighbors and the international community. Japanese militarism once inflicted untold suffering on the region and beyond, yet a full reckoning has never taken place after World War II. Now, the Japanese side has completely stripped away its pretense and accelerated its pace of re-militarization, sparking deep concern and condemnation around the world,” a Chinese defense spokesperson said, in response to Japan’s increased defense budget and plans to allow the export of weapons. See the latest updates with us: @visionergeo tweet
text_zh: Visioner ‼️ 🇨🇳 🇯🇵 突发 | 中国国防部公开警告日本，呼吁其立即停止军事化步伐，并表示否则该地区的紧张局势将会升级。“我们敦促日方停止倒行逆施，与军国主义彻底切割。否则，它将失去亚洲邻国和国际社会的信任。日本军国主义曾给该地区及其他地区造成了难以言表的苦难，但二战后从未进行过彻底的清算。现在，日方已经完全撕下了伪装，加快了再军事化的步伐，引发了全世界的深切关注和谴责，”中国国防部发言人在回应日本增加国防预算和计划允许武器出口时表示。与我们一起查看最新动态：@visionergeo 推文

text: Disclose.tv NOW - Trump: "I ended eight wars, and it may be a little early to say this, but if we add Iran and Lebanon that will be ten wars ended and many many millions of lives saved." https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2045263133044842556/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 此刻 - 特朗普：“我结束了八场战争，现在说这话可能还为时过早，但如果我们加上伊朗和黎巴嫩，那就是结束了十场战争，挽救了数百万人的生命。” https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2045263133044842556/video/1 推文

text: WarMonitor Iran says it’s still effectively closed, only accessible with explicit permission and under strict conditions, which could include a toll. Trump: Iran has just announced that the Strait of Hormuz is fully open and ready for business https://twitter.com/Acyn/status/2045261553797325193/video/1 - Acyn tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 伊朗称海峡实际上仍然关闭，只有在获得明确许可并满足严格条件（可能包括支付通行费）的情况下才能通行。特朗普：伊朗刚刚宣布霍尔木兹海峡已完全开放并准备好通航 https://twitter.com/Acyn/status/2045261553797325193/video/1 - Acyn 推文

text: The Spectator Index Trump says that Iran will never have a nuclear weapon and the US will extract enriched uranium in partnership with Iranians, with lots of 'excavators'. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 特朗普称伊朗永远不会拥有核武器，美国将与伊朗人合作提取浓缩铀，并使用大量的“挖掘机”。推文

text: Disclose.tv NOW - Trump says the U.S. will extract Iran's enriched uranium, in partnership with Iran, using excavators. https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2045262183336902828/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 此刻 - 特朗普称美国将与伊朗合作，使用挖掘机提取伊朗的浓缩铀。https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2045262183336902828/video/1 推文

text: WarMonitor That could explain why ships started turning back. IRGC issued a VHF broadcast which says the Strait of Hormuz is still closed, despite Iranian FM & US Presidents comments on the contrary. The Sepah Navy (IRGC Navy), said opening the Strait will be at the order of Khamenei and 'not some idiot'. Ships wishing to pass the Strait must first obtain permission from the IRGC. The broadcast also said that ships that are connected to Iran's enemies will be targeted. Disclaimer: I cannot verify this audio. However, it is received from a ship in the region. - Martin Kelly tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 这或许可以解释为什么船只开始掉头。尽管伊朗外交部长和美国总统发表了相反的评论，但伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）发布了一份甚高频（VHF）广播，称霍尔木兹海峡仍然关闭。伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军表示，开放海峡将听从哈梅内伊的命令，而不是“某个白痴”的命令。希望通过海峡的船只必须首先获得伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队的许可。广播还称，与伊朗敌人有关联的船只将成为目标。免责声明：我无法核实此音频。不过，它是从该地区的一艘船上接收到的。 - Martin Kelly 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇲 American soldiers engaged in a fierce, high-intensity firefight with Taliban fighters in Afghanistan — gripping combat footage from 2012 capturing the chaos and intensity of the battlefield. https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2045260619767570582/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转推 @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇲 美国士兵在阿富汗与塔利班武装分子进行了激烈的、高强度的交火——这段2012年的战斗录像捕捉到了战场的混乱和激烈程度。https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2045260619767570582/video/1 推文

text: WarMonitor RFK Jr. told Congress he never said autism “destroys” families or that kids with the condition would never pay taxes, hold a job, play sports, write a poem, go on a date, or even use a toilet unassisted. But he did, and here's the receipts... https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2045260268704276695/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 小罗伯特·肯尼迪（RFK Jr.）告诉国会，他从未说过自闭症会“摧毁”家庭，也从未说过患有这种疾病的孩子永远无法纳税、工作、参加体育运动、写诗、约会，甚至无法在无人协助的情况下使用厕所。但他确实说过，这是证据…… https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2045260268704276695/video/1 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 CNN: The USS Gerald R. Ford aircraft carrier has entered the Red Sea alongside the guided-missile destroyers USS Mahan and USS Winston S. Churchill after transiting the Suez Canal from the Eastern Mediterranean. Additional U.S. naval assets are also moving into the region, including the USS George H. W. Bush, which is en route and could reinforce or replace the Ford, while the USS Abraham Lincoln is already operating in the Middle East. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 CNN：杰拉尔德·R·福特号航空母舰在穿过苏伊士运河从东地中海进入红海后，已与马汉号和温斯顿·S·丘吉尔号导弹驱逐舰会合。其他美国海军资产也正在向该地区移动，包括正在途中可能增援或替换福特号的乔治·H·W·布什号，而亚伯拉罕·林肯号已在中东地区执行任务。 @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇦 Ukraine’s military ombudsman admits a widespread issue: drug-dependent individuals are serving in the armed forces. What was first discovered in one unit turned out to be a broader pattern across the military. Many had previously been on substitution therapy — which cannot be continued in service. 🐻 Just like their president... 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇦 乌克兰军事监察员承认了一个普遍存在的问题：有毒瘾的人员正在武装部队中服役。最初在一个部队中发现的问题，结果证明是整个军队中更广泛的模式。许多人此前曾接受替代疗法——但在服役期间无法继续进行。 🐻 就像他们的总统一样…… 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Visioner ‼️ ‼️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 BREAKING | The U.S. Navy’s largest aircraft carrier, the USS Gerald R. Ford, has returned to the Middle East. ➡️ The carrier, which had recently been operating in the Eastern Mediterranean, transited the Suez Canal alongside two destroyers — USS Mahan and USS Winston S. Churchill — and is now in the Red Sea, where it may take part in military operations against Iran if necessary. See the latest updates with us: @visionergeo tweet
text_zh: Visioner ‼️ ‼️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 突发 | 美国海军最大的航空母舰“杰拉尔德·R·福特”号（USS Gerald R. Ford）已返回中东。➡️ 该航母此前一直在东地中海执行任务，现已与两艘驱逐舰——“马汉”号（USS Mahan）和“温斯顿·S·丘吉尔”号（USS Winston S. Churchill）一起通过苏伊士运河，目前位于红海。如有必要，它可能会参与针对伊朗的军事行动。与我们一起查看最新动态：@visionergeo 推文

text: The Spectator Index Trump tells ABC News he will 'prohibit' Netanyahu from bombing Lebanon and will tell Netanyahu 'he cannot do it'. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 特朗普告诉美国广播公司新闻（ABC News），他将“禁止”内塔尼亚胡轰炸黎巴嫩，并会告诉内塔尼亚胡“他不能这样做”。推文

text: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇺🇲 In the best case, Trump is still bluffing and with these lies is creating a kind of psycho-informational bubble to disguise reality, plus manipulating oil prices and giving ground forces time to prepare. Otherwise, it is simply inexplicable what logic Trump’s actions and statements serve. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇺🇲 最好的情况是，特朗普仍在虚张声势，用这些谎言制造一种心理信息泡沫来掩盖现实，同时操纵油价并为地面部队争取准备时间。否则，特朗普的行为和言论所遵循的逻辑简直令人费解。推文

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 U.S. President Trump reports that talks with Iran and about the ceasefire between Israel and Lebanon will likely continue over the weekend. "Talks are going on. It'll go on over the weekend, and a lot of good things are happening. And that includes Lebanon too. Lebanon too." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 美国总统特朗普报告称，与伊朗的谈判以及关于以色列和黎巴嫩之间的停火谈判可能会持续到周末。“谈判正在进行中。它将持续到周末，很多好事正在发生。这也包括黎巴嫩。黎巴嫩也是。” @wfwitness

text: This is a ceasefire that the IDF wants to have the Lebanese state and army fight on its behalf to disarm Hezbullah after the IDF acknowledged clearly that the IDF reserves are exhausted and the IDF is incapable of invading all of Lebanon to disarm every town and village The current lines of occupation are similar to the 1980's excluding some important area they didn't enter. The IDF ground invasion is pathetic, a few km into Lebanon against towns they invaded and attacked and levelled in the 2024 and softened in the support front that sit under high ridges the IDF sits in (in Israel) after proactive attacks and depopulation for 15 months. Hezbullah didn't do as good as you would want to see Israel defeated as. But they did all what is humanly possible and excelled under whatever harsh condition there was and still is The IDF says the ceasefire will allow it to fortify the occupation in the current area to protect Israel from ATGMs attacks (this is why we need dozens of FPVs) The IDF will demolish towns and build basis inside Lebanon as a precaution that the Lebanese state will not be able to disarm Hezbullah If the Lebanese state fails and occupation stays, resistance acts and war happens again Do you guys understand the circle of events here?
text_zh: 这是一份停火协议，以色列国防军希望黎巴嫩国家和军队能代其行事，解除真主党的武装，因为以色列国防军已明确承认其预备役力量耗尽，且无力入侵整个黎巴嫩以解除每个城镇和村庄的武装。目前的占领线与20世纪80年代相似，但排除了一些他们未进入的重要区域。以色列国防军的地面入侵表现糟糕，仅深入黎巴嫩几公里，针对的是那些在2024年已被入侵、攻击和夷为平地的城镇，这些城镇在经历了15个月的主动攻击和人口流失后，位于以色列国防军（在以色列境内）所占据的高脊之下，处于支援前线。真主党并没有像你所希望看到以色列被击败的那样表现出色，但他们在任何严酷的条件下都尽了人力所能及的一切，表现卓越。以色列国防军称，停火将使其能够巩固当前区域的占领，以保护以色列免受反坦克导弹攻击（这就是为什么我们需要数十架FPV无人机）。以色列国防军将拆毁城镇并在黎巴嫩境内建立基地，以防黎巴嫩国家无法解除真主党的武装。如果黎巴嫩国家失败且占领持续，抵抗行动和战争将再次发生。你们明白这里的事件循环吗？

text: 🇺🇸 ✝️ 🤡 Trump’s spiritual advisor, Paula White: “Saying no to Trump would be saying no to God” 🐻 OK, we admit - it's getting hard to keep up with this all. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ✝️ 🤡 特朗普的精神顾问宝拉·怀特：“拒绝特朗普就是拒绝上帝” 🐻 好吧，我们承认——要跟上这一切确实变得越来越难了。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 ⚡ Iran's Foreign Ministry spokesman Esmail Baghaei: Iran’s enriched uranium is as sacred as the country’s soil and will under no circumstances be transferred anywhere.
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 ⚡ 伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖伊：伊朗的浓缩铀与国家的领土一样神圣，在任何情况下都不会转移到任何地方。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇦🇬 The IRGC ordered the Bhagya Laxmi container ship, sailing under the Antiguan flag, to turn back after they approached the Strait of Hormuz in an attempt to cross it. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇦🇬 伊斯兰革命卫队命令悬挂安提瓜国旗的“Bhagya Laxmi”号集装箱船在接近霍尔木兹海峡试图穿越时掉头。 @wfwitness

text: 🇷🇺 🇹🇷 Sergey Lavrov has arrived in Turkey to attend the Antalya Diplomacy Forum. Maria Zakharova said he is scheduled to speak at a special session and hold several bilateral meetings with foreign counterparts. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 🇹🇷 谢尔盖·拉夫罗夫已抵达土耳其，出席安塔利亚外交论坛。玛丽亚·扎哈罗娃表示，他计划在特别会议上发表讲话，并与外国同行举行多次双边会晤。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Disclose.tv JUST IN - Trump on Lebanon: "I am going to prohibit him [Netanyahu] from bombing Lebanon." When asked how, Trump said he'll tell Netanyahu "he cannot do it." — ABC tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 最新消息 - 特朗普谈黎巴嫩：“我将禁止他 [内塔尼亚胡] 轰炸黎巴嫩。”当被问及如何做到时，特朗普表示他会告诉内塔尼亚胡“他不能这样做”。 — ABC 推文

text: Visioner ‼️ ‼️ 🇮🇷 BREAKING | The IRGC tells the cargo vessel “Bhagya Laxmi” to turn back from the Strait of Hormuz, as it does not have permission to cross. The vessel complies and turns back. See the latest updates with us: @visionergeo https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2045245445631246380/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner ‼️ ‼️ 🇮🇷 突发 | 伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）告知货船“Bhagya Laxmi”号从霍尔木兹海峡折返，因为它没有通行许可。该船服从并折返。与我们一起查看最新动态： @visionergeo https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2045245445631246380/video/1 推文

text: The Spectator Index Iran told mediators it will 'continue to limit the number of ships allowed to cross the Strait of Hormuz' and that it will also charge tolls for the 'remaining period of the cease-fire', according to Wall Street Journal report. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 据《华尔街日报》报道，伊朗告知调解人，它将“继续限制允许通过霍尔木兹海峡的船只数量”，并将在“停火剩余期间”收取通行费。 推文
